title: IKEA India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IKEA India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IKEA India Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
